name: ambient-imagegen
description: Thin Ambient adapter for hosted image-generation APIs that writes image artifacts into the workspace.

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.description: OpenAI API key for GPT Image generation.

env.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
env.description: Google Gemini API key for Nano Banana image models.

env.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
env.description: Alternate Google API key env name for Gemini/Nano Banana image models.

env.name: FAL_KEY
env.description: fal API key for hosted image models including FLUX routes.

env.name: REPLICATE_API_TOKEN
env.description: Replicate API token for hosted image model predictions.

env.name: STABILITY_API_KEY
env.description: Stability AI API key for Stable Image / Stable Diffusion hosted generation.

env.name: IDEOGRAM_API_KEY
env.description: Ideogram API key for Ideogram hosted image generation.

hosted_image_doctor.description: List supported hosted image providers, required secret env names, defaults, and configured-secret presence without calling provider APIs.

hosted_image_generate.description: Generate one hosted image from a prompt, store the image plus metadata in the workspace, and print bounded JSON.
